title: Polished Dark GUI
description: An extensive GUI rework for dark mode! Based on Fancy GUI and inspired by the best.
body:
![splash image saying Polished Dark GUI](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/6ded1be004cbbb05e3ebf9f947d378a9846994dd.png)

## Minecraft with dark menus
This is a resource pack to improve the menus in Minecraft. It focuses on in-game menus, but also edits the menu buttons and the HUD. It does not replace the Title or Realms logo.

![visual](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d5fedc050bb39368c84e655d6b8019f1504caa32_0.webp)

### Extra features
**When used with Optifine or OptiGUI:**
- Ender chest appearance
- Shulker box appearance

**When used with Optifine or Animatica:**
- animated fox in the survival inventory
- animated cat in chests and other generic containers

To have all features using Optifine alternatives, install both OptiGUI and Animatica.

![visual](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d5fedc050bb39368c84e655d6b8019f1504caa32_0.webp)

### Installation
Resource packs are supported directly by Mojang, meaning they work with every mod platform (Forge, Fabric, etc.) as well as vanilla minecraft (even Realms). In the modrinth app, you can click your instance or make a new one, then type in "Polished Dark GUI" and click Add Content.

To manually install any resource pack, you need to go the resourcepacks folder. If you didn't change the install location, this is how to do it:
- Press the Windows key and type %appdata% then open the first result
- Open the folder called .minecraft which should be near the top
- Open the folder inside it called resourcepacks
- Copy this zip file into that location. DO NOT EXTRACT IT

![visual](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d5fedc050bb39368c84e655d6b8019f1504caa32_0.webp)

### Maintenance
I want to maintain this for future versions, but I won't backport it. I might extend it to other modded GUIs depending on popularity. I don't plan on backporting. If you want to contribute tweaks, I'll evaluate and include them or an edited version of them under the license of this mod, and you will get credit.
